# Backlog Item BI-260049: Implement Username/Password Authentication

- **Status**: Ready
- **Related Requirements**:
  - [REQ-FR-260057](.github/project/evolution/requirements/REQ-FR-260057.md)
  - [REQ-FR-260058](.github/project/evolution/requirements/REQ-FR-260058.md)
  - [REQ-OR-260013](.github/project/evolution/requirements/REQ-OR-260013.md)
- **Related ADRs**:
  - [ADR-260049](.github/project/evolution/adr/ADR-260049.md)

## Summary

This work item tracks the implementation of a traditional username/password authentication mechanism. This will supplement the existing Google Sign-In capability, providing users with an alternative way to access the application. The initial implementation will treat both username and email inputs as the `email` field for the backend, as a temporary measure until the backend fully supports distinct username and email fields.
